name: chrX_Xq21_3_POU3F4_inversion_SD
description: Xq21.1 region 900 kb upstream of POU3F4. Three SDs in inverted orientation (~2-5 kb at >99% identity) mediate recurrent inversions and 8-kb-flanking microdeletions that disrupt POU3F4 regulation and cause DFNX2 (X-linked deafness type 3).

architecture.internal_structure: Three inverted SD copies of 2-5 kb at 99% identity flanking the POU3F4 regulatory region; NAHR causes recurrent inversion + deletion.
